prompt: A simple icon for a dark-themed website called 'The Apothecary' — a skills catalog for programmers. The icon should be a single apothecary mortar and pestle, rendered as a minimal line drawing in warm amber/gold color on a pure black background. Thin precise lines, no fill, just outlines. Think vintage pharmaceutical symbol meets modern app icon. No text, no decorative borders, just the mortar and pestle centered. Clean, geometric, recognizable at 32x32 pixels.
